subcodes.first_line: O spiritual loved ones of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The Most Exalted Leaf of Paradise—upon her be the glory of the Most Glorious—was a manifestation of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی عبدالبهاء حضرت ورقه الفردوس علیها بهاء الله الابهی مظهر عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom
